case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. CHRISTINA SANDOVAL et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, CHRISTINA $8,570.00 PRINCIPAL, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,775.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-11-2010, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, CHRISTINA DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-11-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-12-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-27-2010
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION SERVED FEB-15-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, CHRISTINA
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20
